design: HK-12 council decision (board/BOARD_DONE.md) + process/contracts.md §5 severity ladder
note: Cross-reference stamp (PROD-26): the tool stays runnable in packages/repin/ per the stays-in-home rule. Pinned set = repin.py only; each consumer's .repin.toml is repo-owned config and never travels. Consumers vendor at repin-vN (scope-guard model) and list the tool in their own [[tool]] manifest so the vendored copy watches its own staleness.
